name: bestocr
description: Text-recognition routing for documents — probe first, then pick the best path: born-digital PDFs get text-layer extraction (never OCR'd; re-recognizing rendered math is strictly worse), scanned PDFs get OCR. First skill: latex-article-record — journal PDF → faithful, compile-verified LaTeX article record (metadata + every theorem and numbered equation with original numbering + flagged editorial notes). Companion to bestasr (audio) and batch-ocr (raster OCR pipeline).
